summary: hello244a postinstall exfiltrates /etc/shadow via Docker host mount to pipedream webhook
details: The package's package.json declares a postinstall script that runs automatically on npm install. The inline node script uses child_process.execSync to invoke `docker run --rm -v /:/host alpine cat /host/etc/shadow` and to read /etc/hostname, then POSTs the collected data as JSON to https://eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net via https.request. This is a Docker container-escape credential harvester: it mounts the host root filesystem inside a container to read system password hashes and hostname, then exfiltrates them to an attacker-controlled webhook. The behavior fires without user interaction on npm install and produces direct attacker benefit (host password hashes + host identifier).

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
